content.full_text:
A-76-331

October 27, 1976


Ms. Brenda Payne
7947-47 Reseda Boulevard
Reseda, California

Dear Ms. Payne:

Thank you for your letter of October 3, 1976, requesting
information concerning political action committees registered
with the Federal Election Commission.

The Fair Political Practices Commission does not retain the
information you request. I suggest you contact either the
Federal Election Commission, 1325 K Street, Washington, D.C.
20005 or the Secretary of State, P. O. Box 1467, Sacramento,
95803. Either of the two offices mentioned above should be
able to supply you with the information.

Very truly yours,


REGINA SICILIANO-KUTCHINS
Technical Assistance Program Coordinator


RSK:mak

7947-47 Reseda Blvd.
Reseda, California
October 3, 1976


Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California  95804

Dear Sir,
     Please send me information on the corporations, industries and labor unions that have political action committees and similar organization registered with the F.B.C.
     In addition, please inform  as to how I can obtain lists of contributions made to various candidates and incumbents.


Thank you,

Brenda Payne
Brenda Payne
